series_metadata.series_title: Managed Care Organizations (MCO) Appeal Response Letters
series_metadata.series_description: The Managed Care Organizations (MCO) Appeal Response Letters are correspondence (concerning the MCO audit, which was preformed by BWC) sent from the MCO to the BWC. The MCO Appeal Response Letters contain the drafts of audit reports, MCO appeals (concerning the lack of controls discovered during the audits), and the final MCO audit reports.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: MCO Appeal Response Letters, in office
